stories.title: Live updates: USA's 2026 World Cup roster reveal
stories.summary: Enjoy all the updates from New York City as we find out which USMNT players make Mauricio Pochettino's 26-man list for the 2026 World Cup.

stories.title: Donovan, Twellman, Pepi: Who are the USMNT's bigge...
stories.summary: Who were some United States players who were shockingly left off World Cup rosters in the past?

stories.title: Sources: Atkinson to return as Cavs head coach
stories.summary: Kenny Atkinson will return next season as the Cleveland Cavaliers coach, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

stories.title: Sark: Basket weaving dig 'poor choice of words'
stories.summary: Texas coach Steve Sarkisian conceded that his recent comment about "basket weaving" and Ole Miss was a "poor choice of words."

stories.title: MacKinnon to play G4 as Avs look to avoid sweep
stories.summary: Avalanche star Nathan MacKinnon will play in Game 4 of the Western Conference finals as Colorado looks to avoid a series sweep.
